text.title: TypeScript Strict + isolatedDeclarations + Project References Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the ts-strict-isolated methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: update-lib-tsconfigs
step.action: Each library/package extends base + sets isolatedDeclarations + composite + references.

step.name: verify-build
step.action: Run Biome/oxc/swc to confirm `.d.ts` emit works without tsc inference.
step.decision-gate: If emit fails, check isolatedDeclarations errors and fix annotations.

step.name: ratchet-existing-anys
step.action: Inventory existing `any` usages; schedule removal sprint-by-sprint.
